tagline: Sonoma County's go-to roofers for re-roofs, repairs & new construction
seoDescription: Guardian Roofing LLC is a family-owned, GAF-certified roofing contractor in Santa Rosa, CA. Re-roofs, repairs, new construction & inspections in Sonoma County.
heroHeading: GAF-certified Sonoma County roofing, with owner John on every job
heroSubheading: Family-owned and GAF-certified, Guardian Roofing handles re-roofs, repairs, new construction, and inspections across Santa Rosa and beyond.
highlights: Family-owned and locally operated in Santa Rosa
GAF-certified installer (System Plus Limited Warranty on qualifying systems)
Owner John is on-site as your project manager
5.0-star rated on HomeAdvisor/Angi and A+ with the BBB
aboutBody: Guardian Roofing is a family-owned, licensed roofing company serving Santa Rosa and the wider Sonoma County area. Owner John was born and raised in Sonoma County and has been roofing since around 2010, spending a decade with a local family-owned roofer before studying nights to earn his contractor's license and launch Guardian Roofing in 2019.

John runs every job as the on-site project manager, while his wife Heather keeps customers informed from the office — an approach that has earned the company consistent five-star reviews. As a GAF-certified installer, Guardian is your go-to for re-roofs, new construction, repairs, and inspections.
servicesHeading: Roofing services for homes and businesses

services.title: Re-Roofing
services.description: Full residential and commercial re-roofs designed to improve your home's value and energy efficiency, with quality materials and a clean, careful install.

services.title: Roof Repair & Maintenance
services.description: We inspect your damaged roof, send a detailed quote, and provide a long-lasting repair so small problems don't become big ones.

services.title: New Construction Roofing
services.description: Reliable roofing for new residential and commercial builds, installed to last from the first layer of underlayment up.

services.title: Roof Inspections
services.description: Thorough inspections to assess the condition of your roof and give you an honest, detailed assessment of what it needs.

services.title: GAF Shingle & Solar Shingle Systems
services.description: As a GAF-certified installer, we offer GAF shingle systems — including solar shingle installation — backed by GAF's System Plus Limited Warranty on qualifying roofs.

services.title: Metal & TPO Flat Roofing
services.description: For homes and commercial buildings we install metal roofing and TPO single-ply membrane, a cost-effective, high-performance option for low-slope and flat roofs.

testimonials.quote: John is not only the Owner but also the Project Manager who was on-site for the entirety of the roof install. He is a person of integrity, demands quality, and is highly skilled in his craft. His estimate was very reasonable and he communicated well with me. It was a pleasure working with him.
testimonials.author: Verified Customer

testimonials.quote: The owner, John, was prompt, informative and on site doing great work, and his wife Heather in the office was always cheerful, informative and responsive.
testimonials.author: Verified Customer

testimonials.quote: John and his team were very professional and best of all kept me informed of their progress and involved me in the decision making process by providing me alternatives that fit my budget. I would highly recommend them to all of my friends.
testimonials.author: Verified Customer

notes:
DISAMBIGUATION: This is the Santa Rosa / Sonoma County company 'Guardian Roofing LLC' at 2210 Dennis Ln, Santa Rosa, CA 95403, phone (707) 843-3526, email guardianroofllc@gmail.com, site guardianroofllc.com. Distinct from the larger 'Guardian Roofing, Gutters & Insulation' in Washington (guardianroofing.com) and from 'Guardian Roofs' in Southern California (guardianroofs.com) and Guardian Rain Gutters in San Juan Capistrano — all confirmed to be different businesses. All facts below are for the Santa Rosa LLC only.

VERIFIED FACTS: Family-owned, licensed roofing company in Santa Rosa. Owner 'John' born/raised in Sonoma County, roofing since ~2009-2010, worked ~10 years for a local family-owned roofer before getting his license; wife 'Heather' runs the office (last names not published — left as 'Verified Customer' / owner field blank). Founded/launched 2019 per their own About Us page (NOTE DISCREPANCY: BBB lists business start date 1/22/2020 — used 2019 since it's the company's own stated founding). CSLB License #1062288 classified Roofing (C-39); expiration reported as 1/31/2026 (BBB) vs 1/31/2028 (other aggregators) — license # is solid, exact expiry uncertain, so not asserted on-site. GAF-certified installer offering GAF System Plus Limited Warranty on qualifying systems; offers solar shingles. Materials confirmed: underlayment, shingles (composition/GAF), metal, TPO. Services confirmed from their own service pages: re-roofing, roof repair & maintenance, new construction, inspections.

RATING CROSS-CHECK: HomeAdvisor 5.0/5 and Angi 5.0/5 (review counts not captured precisely — appears modest count). BBB: A+ rating. BuildZoom score 114, top 2% of CA licensed contractors; ~100 building permits totaling ~$1,024,500. Yelp profile exists ('Updated March 2026') but star rating/count not captured. No specific awards verified — none asserted.

HOURS: Mon-Fri 7am-4pm, closed weekends (per BBB/aggregators).

PHOTOS: Their own website (guardianroofllc.com) returns HTTP 403 to automated fetch, so no direct image URLs could be retrieved/verified — realPhotoUrls left EMPTY. They have a Facebook page (link in social) which likely has real job photos; pull manually before send if desired. Fall back to category/Wikimedia art otherwise. Do NOT claim any photo is theirs unless visually confirmed from their FB/site.

TESTIMONIALS: Quotes are real (sourced from their testimonials page + HomeAdvisor/Angi aggregations) but reviewer full names were not reliably captured, so authors are labeled 'Verified Customer' rather than inventing initials.
